name: I don’t have a big budget—what are the most important answer engine and voice search optimizations I can do first?
description: Prioritize content and schema: rewrite a handful of key pages around real customer questions, add concise answers and FAQ sections, then implement FAQ and Local

mainEntity.name: I don’t have a big budget—what are the most important answer engine and voice search optimizations I can do first?

acceptedAnswer.text:
For a limited budget, focus on high-impact AEO steps that don’t require custom development.

Content and schema changes alone can move the needle for voice search.

**Key factors**
- Rewrite 5–10 priority pages with question-based headings and direct answers.
- Add an on-page FAQ section targeting common voice-style queries.
- Implement basic FAQ and LocalBusiness schema using simple plugins or tools.
- Use free data sources like Search Console and “People Also Ask” for research.

Time-box your effort (e.g., 20–30 hours), aim for clear deliverables, and measure snippet and AI citation gains before investing more.

Think of it as a staged project where early, budget-conscious wins justify deeper investment later.
acceptedAnswer.description: Prioritize content and schema: rewrite a handful of key pages around real customer questions, add concise answers and FAQ sections, then implement FAQ and LocalBusiness schema with low-cost tools. Use free data like Search Console and “People Also Ask” to guide your topics before spending on advanced AEO services.
